command.title: Command Center
command.desc: Real-time summary from Narriv. Monitor, analyze, and take action quickly.
command.demoModeDesc: Showing sample data for demonstration purposes
command.activityDesc: Signal movement in the last 24 hours
command.sourcesDesc: Status and performance of data sources.

command.emptyMap: No mapped signal activity yet. New Apify signals with location hints will appear here automatically.

quickActionContent.newAlertDesc: Create a manual alert to monitor specific issues not yet auto-detected.
quickActionContent.newAlertItem1Desc: Monitor competitor activity and sentiment in real-time.
quickActionContent.newAlertItem2Desc: Track marketing campaign performance across all channels.
quickActionContent.newAlertItem3Desc: Watch specific issues that need immediate attention.
quickActionContent.reportDesc: Generate sentiment analysis and AI visibility reports automatically.
quickActionContent.analyzeDesc: Run in-depth analysis on collected signals and narratives.
quickActionContent.analyzeItem1Desc: Comprehensive sentiment analysis from all sources.
quickActionContent.sourcesDesc: Access and configure data sources connected to the platform.
quickActionContent.settingsDesc: Manage workspace settings, integrations, and system preferences.
quickActionContent.helpDesc: Get help from the support team or access documentation.
quickActionContent.helpItem1Desc: Access the complete platform usage guide.
quickActionContent.helpItem2Desc: Contact the support team for technical assistance.

visibility.title: AI Visibility
visibility.desc: Monitor how your brand, topics, and competitors appear on generative AI platforms.

signals.title: Signals
signals.desc: Track important conversations and narrative signals from every source.
signals.tableDesc: Prioritized by volume, sentiment, and confidence.

alerts.title: Alerts
alerts.desc: Review warnings that require attention before they escalate.

intelligence.title: Intelligence
intelligence.desc: Understand topic clusters, narrative growth, and strategic context.

reports.title: Reports
reports.desc: Create and review stakeholder-ready intelligence reports.

actions.title: Action Center
actions.desc: Manage actions and track response progress for important issues.

sources.title: Data Sources
sources.desc: Manage sources used by Narriv to monitor signals and topics.

settings.title: Settings
settings.desc: Manage profile, notifications, analysis preferences, team, security, and language.

ActionPlans.title: Action Center
ActionPlans.desc: Manage actions and monitor progress on important issues in a structured way.
ActionPlans.detailDesc: Detailed AI recommendation for selected action.
ActionPlans.learningDesc: AI insights to improve action effectiveness.

toast.feedbackRetry: Feedback could not be sent. Please try again.

ActionPlans.noFeedbackDesc: Feedback will appear here once actions are reviewed.
ActionPlans.detailEmptyDesc: Select an action from the list to view full details, status, and history.
ActionPlans.detailNoPlanDesc: AI analysis will appear here once the action plan is generated.
ActionPlans.performanceEmptyDesc: Select an action to view its performance.
ActionPlans.learningEmptyDesc: Select an action to view its insights and learning.
ActionPlans.learningNoDataDesc: Insights will appear after this action receives feedback or follow-up activity.
ActionPlans.insight1Title: Payment delay topics have the longest resolution
ActionPlans.insight2Title: Actions with templates have higher success rate
ActionPlans.insight3Title: Fast communication in first hour reduces negative sentiment
ActionPlans.queueErrorTitle: Live action list could not be loaded
ActionPlans.queueErrorDesc: API client attempted token refresh. Showing sample actions for now.
ActionPlans.planErrorTitle: Live action detail could not be loaded
ActionPlans.planErrorDesc: Detail panel still uses sample data until backend is available.
ActionPlans.emptyDesc: Backend connected successfully, but no action plans have been created.
ActionPlans.noMatchDesc: Try another search term, priority, or status filter.

modal.title: Create Action Plan
modal.desc: Generate an AI-powered action plan for your workspace.
modal.prDesc: Focus on public and media communication
modal.suDesc: Clear updates for internal and external stakeholders
modal.ddDesc: Evidence-led actions based on signals and metrics
modal.hint: AI will analyze your workspace data and generate a tailored action plan.

toast.successDesc: The action plan has been generated successfully.
toast.errorDesc: An error occurred while generating the action plan.

Sources.title: Data Sources
Sources.desc: Manage and monitor every data source used by Narriv.

Sources.optimalDesc: All critical sources are in healthy condition.
Sources.connectDesc: Add a new data source to expand monitoring coverage.
Sources.volumeDesc: Comparison of signal volume from every source.
Sources.settingsKeywordDesc: Manage main keywords for all sources.
Sources.settingsRateLimitDesc: Set request limits and sync speed.

errors.title: This page could not be opened

modal.title: Connect Data Sources
modal.desc: Configure monitoring parameters for new sources.
modal.keywordHint: Used as the search input across platforms.
modal.categoryDesc: The system will monitor activity on the following platforms.
modal.socialDesc: Monitor conversations on X (Twitter), TikTok, Instagram, Threads, and Google Search results.
modal.videoDesc: Monitor video trends on YouTube and public posts on Facebook.
modal.ecommerceDesc: Monitor product reviews on Tokopedia & Shopee, Kaskus discussions, and podcasts on Spotify & YT Music.
